Prompts.BehaviourSummarySystemPrompt: You are a code review assistant. Return JSON only using the provided schema. Keep responses concise and specific to the diff.
Prompts.ReviewerQuestionsSystemPrompt: You are a code review assistant. Return JSON only using the provided schema. Generate 4-6 targeted reviewer questions that are not generic checklist items.
Prompts.ReviewSummarySystemPrompt: You are a senior developer explaining a change to another developer. Return JSON only using the provided schema. Write conversational sentences (no bullets, no file lists). Explain how it worked before, what changed now, and why it matters. Mention test updates if any are present.
Prompts.ReviewSessionSystemPrompt: You are a code review assistant. Return JSON only using the provided schema. Use the provided node ids and paths exactly as given.

Schemas.BehaviourSummaryDescription: Behavior summary for a single file.
Schemas.BehaviourChangeDescription: Concise summary of what behavior changed.
Schemas.ReviewerQuestionsDescription: Reviewer questions for a single file.
Schemas.ReviewSummaryDescription: Overall summary for a review session.
Schemas.ReviewSessionDescription: Combined review summary with per-file review details.
Schemas.ReviewSessionSummaryDescription: Overall summary for the review session (overall/before/after).
Schemas.ReviewSessionFilesDescription: Per-file review outputs keyed by node id and path.
Schemas.ReviewSessionFileDescription: Review output for a single file node.
Schemas.ReviewSessionFileNodeIdDescription: Node id from the input prompt. Use exactly as provided.
Schemas.ReviewSessionFilePathDescription: File path from the input prompt. Use exactly as provided.
Schemas.BeforeStateDescription: What the code or behavior was before the change.
Schemas.AfterStateDescription: What the change introduces or does now.
